properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve wandered far away from God, Now I’m coming home; The paths of sin too long I’ve trod, Lord, I’m coming home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Coming home, coming home, Nevermore to roam; Open wide Thine arms of love, Lord, I’m coming home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’ve wasted many precious years, Now I’m coming home; I now repent with bitter tears, Lord, I’m coming home.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’m tired of sin and straying, Lord, Now I’m coming home; I’ll trust Thy love, believe Thy Word, Lord, I’m coming home.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My soul is sick, my heart is sore, Now I’m coming home; My strength renew, my hope restore, Lord, I’m coming home.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My only hope, my only plea, Now I’m coming home; That Jesus died, and died for me, Lord, I’m coming home.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I need His cleansing blood, I know, Now I’m coming home; O wash me whiter than the snow, Lord, I’m coming home.
